title: Addressing income and wealth inequality
paperName: Cambridge International AS Level Economics (P1 & P2)
summary: 9708 AS — redistribution, progressive tax, and welfare policy.

simpleExplanation.title: Spreading outcomes more evenly
simpleExplanation.summary: Markets can produce unequal distributions. Governments use tax and transfer systems to reduce poverty and gap between rich and poor.
steps: Income: flow of earnings; wealth: stock of assets.
Progressive tax: higher % on higher bands.
Minimum wage helps but may cost jobs.

sections.content: **Inequality** (3.3) links **8.2 equity** themes. Use **Gini coefficient** and **policy examples** in essays.
